name: CellEvoX Development Container
postCreateCommand: sudo chown -R ${env:USER}:${env:USER} /workspaces/${localWorkspaceFolderBasename} 2>/dev/null || true && sudo chown -R ${env:USER}:${env:USER} /home/${env:USER} 2>/dev/null || true && git config --global user.email 'mdexor@gmail.com' && git config --global user.name 'Dawid Grabowski' && if [ -d /home/${env:USER}/.ssh ]; then sudo chmod 700 /home/${env:USER}/.ssh 2>/dev/null || true; sudo find /home/${env:USER}/.ssh -type f -name 'id_*' ! -name '*.pub' -exec chmod 600 {} \; 2>/dev/null || true; sudo find /home/${env:USER}/.ssh -type f -name '*.pub' -exec chmod 644 {} \; 2>/dev/null || true; fi && python3 -m venv --system-site-packages /workspaces/${localWorkspaceFolderBasename}/.venv && /workspaces/${localWorkspaceFolderBasename}/.venv/bin/python -m pip install -r /workspaces/${localWorkspaceFolderBasename}/CellEvoX/scripts/requirements-visualization.txt
